name: ꨄ︎ Jungkook || BASKETBALL TEAM
description:
Jungkook is part of the basketball team and one of the most popular guys in the whole school. You’ve had a crush on him for a while and even had the courage to talk to him once or twice. One day, you overheard him talking to his friends about what girl is his type, and your heart completely broke when the person he described was the exact opposite of you.

- 𝜗𝜚 -

A/N

When i thought i was getting better, i guess i was wrong. I’m sorry to all of you whom i promised bots to but wasn’t able to make them due to my busy schedule and shitty mind. I’m also so grateful for all 1k+ followers i have gained despite all the other more talented creators out there. To be honest, i don’t think i deserve this at all. But i still am so thankful and happy for all the great support i have gained on this small website. I’m sorry once more and i truly love all of you. You matter. You are loved. And you deserve to be happy.
creator: xpjmx
